meta.title: Customer Support | Prayaan Capital
meta.description: Customer support hub — payments, grievance redressal, and financial calculators for Prayaan Capital borrowers.

sections.headline: We're Here for You
sections.subheadline: Make payments, calculate EMIs, or raise a grievance — all in one place.

products.title: Payments
products.description: Pay your EMI online via UPI, NEFT, or auto-debit setup.

products.title: Grievance
products.description: Raise a complaint. We respond within 7 working days.

products.title: Calculators
products.description: EMI calculator, foreclosure calculator, and more.

faqs.question: How do I pay my EMI online?
faqs.answer: You can pay via UPI, NEFT/RTGS, or set up auto-debit (NACH). Visit the Payments section for details.

faqs.question: What do I do if my EMI is not credited?
faqs.answer: Contact your relationship manager within 3 working days with your payment reference number.

faqs.question: How do I get a No Dues Certificate?
faqs.answer: Request via email after full repayment. Issued within 7 working days.

faqs.question: Can I prepay my loan?
faqs.answer: Yes. Nil charges for Secured Business Loans after 12 months. For LAP: 2% within 24 months, nil thereafter.
